name: Cheddar Bacon Treat
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon slices until crisp, then crumble.
2. Beat the cheddar, lemon juice, worcestershire sauce, paprika, garlic powder, and pepper together until fluffy.
3. Mix in the sour cream.
4. Add the crumbled bacon to the mixture.
5. Spread about 2 tablespoons of the mixture on each slice of bread.
6. Arrange lettuce and tomato slices on two of the bread slices.
7. Top with the remaining bread slices.
8. Serve.
